title: oncoba suffruticosa
intro: Oncoba suffruticosa, also known as the 'Millet Tree' or 'African Millet Tree', is a deciduous tree native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Oncoba suffruticosa include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Oncoba suffruticosa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Oncoba suffruticosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, making it a valuable resource in traditional African medicine.
